tagline: Essays and books with live word-synced transcripts and chapter visuals

items.title: Word-level sync
items.description: Every spoken word highlights in time. Click any word to jump.

items.title: Chapter visuals
items.description: Hero images, quotes, and captions for each section.

termsOfService: Book Player is personal software. Use at your own risk. No warranties. Contact via GitHub for issues.
privacyPolicy: Book Player stores progress and notes locally and on your chosen backend. No third-party analytics or data selling. See source for details.
EULA: Personal, non-transferable license for the Book Player software. No reverse engineering. Provided as-is.
subscriptionDetails: This app does not use subscriptions.
